text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Nov  9 21:46:31 2013
New Revision: 333342
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333342

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/183692
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-Canvas/Makefile

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-Canvas/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-Canvas/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:46:27 2013	(r333341)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gnome2-Canvas/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:46:31 2013	(r333342)
@@ -9,9 +9,11 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN/Gnome2 \
 		SF/gtk2-perl/Gnome2_Canvas/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Allows a perl developer to use the GnomeCanvas widget with Gtk2-Perl
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-ExtUtils-Depends>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-Depends \
 		p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig \
 		p5-Glib2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2 \
